# Alessandro Buffi Architect

> Italian architecture studio for estates, wineries, historic villas and rural
> hospitality in Umbria and Tuscany. Working from Perugia and Florence for
> international and Italian clients, from the first walk on the site to the
> finished work.

## About
- Approach: "Architecture of position" — every site in central Italy already
  belongs to a composition: a ridge of olive trees, the fall of a valley, the
  silhouette of a basilica. This means measuring every wall, opening and terrace
  against topography, landscape and the historic city. This is the method behind
  every commission the studio takes on.
- Fields: estates & historic villas; wineries & productive land; rural hospitality.
- Territory: Umbria, Tuscany and central Italy.
- Languages: English, German, Italian.
- Method: every commission begins with a site & feasibility study.

## Services
- Site & acquisition feasibility
- Architecture (masterplan, restoration, new construction)
- Permitting & heritage authorizations
- Construction direction
- Interiors & landscape
- Ongoing care

## Selected work
- Agriturismo Alma, Assisi (2023–2026) — rural hospitality and agricultural
  production, EUR 2.5M of works.
